message:
🐛 Fix EPG sources + add edit button + compact fullscreen overlay

- Replace dead EPG sources (epg.pw, open-epg.com) with working usa-local-epg
- Add User-Agent header to EPG HTTP requests (fixes 403 errors)
- Add edit button on EPG sources (pencil icon) to update name/URL
- Fix Value import in settings_screen.dart
- Compact fullscreen overlay: smaller padding, tighter top bar
- Video fills entire screen (StackFit.expand, no Center wrapper)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
